title: Extra Enchantments
description:
Adds 24 new enchantments as an addition to the vanilla ones
Included gear:
bow, sword, mace, boots, elytra, leggings  & turtle helmet
body:
# **Extra Enchantments**
This datapack adds 21 new enchantments that fit well with vanilla gameplay.

It also adds 3 curses.

---

# **Obtaining**
You can get the enchantments by:

- Enchanting in an enchanting table  
- Finding in loot chests  
- Trading with villagers  

---

# **Questions, bugs and suggestions**
**Discord: pancake_0_0_0**

If you notice a bug, **_PLEASE TELL ME_** — I want to improve this project so everyone can enjoy it!

If you have suggestions, **_PLEASE TELL ME_**! I am planning on adding more features.

You can ask questions in the Discord server or in private.

---

<details>
<summary>FAQ</summary>

### **Do I need other libraries?**
No, this project doesn't require any libraries.

### **Will you backport the project to older versions?**
No. Older versions do not support datapack enchantments.

### **Will you update this project to newer versions?**
Yes, the project will be updated whenever new Minecraft versions release.

</details>

---

# **The Enchantments**
✨ means treasure enchantments
---
# **Edited vanilla ones**
<details>
<summary>💧 Impaling</summary>

**On:** tridents  
**Max lvl:** 5  
**Incompatible with:** Riptide, Channeling 
**Description:** Deal more damage to **all mobs** touching water 

</details>


# **Melee**

<details>
<summary>🩸 Blood Knight</summary>

**On:** Swords  
**Max lvl:** 3  
**Incompatible with:** -  
**Description:** You deal more damage but sacrifice a small amount of your own health.  

</details>

<details>
<summary>🔪 Butcher</summary>

**On:** Swords  
**Max lvl:** 5  
**Incompatible with:** Sharpness, Smite, Bane of Arthropods, Boss Slayer, Raid, Swiftness  
**Description:** You deal increased damage to farm animals.  

</details>

<details>
<summary>🗡 Boss Slayer✨</summary>

**On:** Swords  
**Max lvl:** 5  
**Incompatible with:** Sharpness, Smite, Bane of Arthropods, Butcher, Raid, Swiftness  
**Description:** You deal increased damage to bosses (Ender Dragon, Wither, Warden, Elder Guardian).  

</details>
<details>
<summary>🔪 Swiftness</summary>

**On:** Swords  
**Max lvl:** 5  
**Incompatible with:** Sharpness, Smite, Bane of Arthropods, Boss Slayer, Raid  
**Description:** Your attack speed is increased.  

</details>

<details>
<summary>⚔ Raid</summary>

**On:** Swords  
**Max lvl:** 5  
**Incompatible with:** Sharpness, Smite, Bane of Arthropods, Boss Slayer, Butcher, Swiftness  
**Description:** You deal more damage to human-like mobs (Pillagers, Villagers, Evokers, etc.).  

</details>

<details>
<summary>⚡ Lighting Aspect</summary>

**On:** Bows  
**Max lvl:** 2  
**Incompatible with:** Frost, Flame, Wind, Venom  
**Description:** 15% / 30% chance to strike lightning on hit 

</details>
<details>
<summary>🧊 Ice Aspect</summary>

**On:** Swords  
**Max lvl:** 2  
**Incompatible with:** Fire Aspect, Lightning Aspect, Poison Aspect
**Description:** Freezes and slows targets.  

</details>

<details>
<summary>🦠 Poison Aspect</summary>

**On:** Swords  
**Max lvl:** 2  
**Incompatible with:** Fire Aspect, Ice Aspect, Lightning Aspect
**Description:** Poison entities on hit  

</details>

---

# **Ranged**

<details>
<summary>🏹 Focus</summary>

**On:** Bows  
**Max lvl:** 3  
**Incompatible with:** -  
**Description:** Crouch to zoom for more accurate aim.  

</details>

<details>
<summary>⚡ Shock</summary>

**On:** Bows  
**Max lvl:** 2  
**Incompatible with:** Frost, Flame, Wind, Venom  
**Description:** 15% / 30% chance to strike lightning when an arrow hits a target.  

</details>

<details>
<summary>🦠 Venom</summary>

**On:** Bows  
**Max lvl:** 2  
**Incompatible with:** Frost, Flame, Wind, Shock  
**Description:** Poisons enemies on arrow hit.  

</details>

<details>
<summary>❄️ Frost</summary>

**On:** Bows  
**Max lvl:** 2  
**Incompatible with:** Venom, Flame, Wind, Shock  
**Description:** 50% chance to slow enemies on arrow hit.  

</details>

<details>
<summary>🌪️ Wind</summary>

**On:** Bows  
**Max lvl:** 2  
**Incompatible with:** Frost, Flame, Venom, Shock  
**Description:** Creates a wind charge explosion (does not activate when hitting an entity).  

</details>

---

# **Armor**

<details>
<summary>🍎 Healthy</summary>

**On:** Armor  
**Max lvl:** 5  
**Incompatible with:** -  
**Description:** Grants extra health.  

</details>

<details>
<summary>🏃🏻‍♂️ Step✨</summary>

**On:** Leggings  
**Max lvl:** 1  
**Incompatible with:** -  
**Description:** Allows stepping up 1-block heights without jumping.  

</details>

<details>
<summary>🥾 Jump✨</summary>

**On:** Boots  
**Max lvl:** 3  
**Incompatible with:** -  
**Description:** Crouch and jump for a powerful leap (fall damage still applies).  

</details>

<details>
<summary>🌊 Sea Athlete✨</summary>

**On:** Turtle Shells  
**Max lvl:** 2  
**Incompatible with:** -  
**Description:** Swim faster in water.  

</details>

<details>
<summary>☁ Flying Protection✨</summary>

**On:** Elytra  
**Max lvl:** 5  
**Incompatible with:** -  
**Description:** Adds extra armor and gives resistance while flying and for a few seconds after landing.  

</details>
<details>
<summary>☁️ Glide</summary>

**On:** Elytra  
**Max lvl:** 3 
**Incompatible with:** -  
**Description:** Lowers your gravity when flying

</details>

---

# **Mace**

<details>
<summary>⚡ Thor✨</summary>

**On:** Mace  
**Max lvl:** 1  
**Incompatible with:** -  
**Description:** If falling far enough, striking an enemy summons lightning.  

</details>

---

# **Curses**

<details>
<summary>💔 Breaking</summary>

**On:** All enchantable gear  
**Max lvl:** 3  
**Incompatible with:** Unbreaking  
**Description:** Gear breaks faster.  

</details>

<details>
<summary>🗑 Inefficiency</summary>

**On:** All enchantable tools  
**Max lvl:** 5  
**Incompatible with:** Efficiency  
**Description:** Blocks are mined slower.  

</details>

<details>
<summary>💔 Unhealthy</summary>

**On:** Armor
**Max lvl:** 5   
**Description:** You lose 1 hp per level.  

</details>
